company.name: New England Sports Photo
company.description: New England Sports Photo is a family-owned youth sports photography company with more than 50 years of experience serving leagues and families throughout New England.

roles.title: Part-Time Customer Service Representative
roles.location: In person at the NESP office in Methuen, Massachusetts
roles.schedule: Monday-Friday, agreed set schedule, generally 9:00 a.m.-3:00 p.m. or 10:00 a.m.-4:00 p.m.
roles.equipment_policy: NESP office systems and training provided

roles.title: Weekend Staff Portrait & Team Photographer - Youth Sports
roles.territory: Primarily Massachusetts, with additional assignments in Connecticut, Rhode Island, Vermont, and New Hampshire
roles.schedule: Most assignments are Saturdays, with some Sundays and early-morning weekend availability
roles.season: September-November and April-June, with optional after-school weekday assignments and future seasonal opportunities possible
roles.equipment_policy: NESP provides professional equipment for staff photographer assignments

roles.title: Freelance/Contract Youth Sports Photographer
roles.territory: Massachusetts, Rhode Island, New Hampshire, and Connecticut
roles.schedule: Primarily weekends, usually from morning through early or mid-afternoon; optional after-school weekday assignments may be available
roles.season: Part-time seasonal contract assignments are generally available September-November and April-June
roles.equipment_policy: Freelance photographers provide their own approved professional equipment

roles.title: Weekend Table Greeter / Field Assistant
roles.territory: Primarily Massachusetts, with additional events in Connecticut, Rhode Island, and New Hampshire
roles.schedule: Part-time seasonal work generally available September-November and April-June, primarily Saturdays
roles.season: September-November and April-June; training and early assignments may begin in April
roles.equipment_policy: Training, workflow guidance, and posing guides provided by NESP
